violations.text: Handsinks observed blocked by trash containers and boxes. Whisk observed in a handsink. Employees observed rinsing and draining into a handsink. Handsinks shall be accessible at all times for employee use and must only be used for handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
Parasite destruction letter(s) not available on-site at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Raw chicken was not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. It was observed stored above miso and noodles. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods/foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Proper, complete logs are not maintained indicating proper procedures for acidification of rice. Proper logs must be completed daily. Logs must be available for inspector review. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
Rice spoon observed stored in stagnant water between uses. In-use utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
Records/logs are not being made or maintained per the variance to use acidification for sushi rice. Proper logs must be maintained on-site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/brown residue. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

The ceiling above the ice machine is not covered with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Duct work is exposed in this area. Proper ceiling/tiles must be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
